title: Connected Boards and Mirror Columns

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Commercial_Compliance_Master1012×907 72.3 KB

Fire_Panel_Monitoring1099×512 49.2 KB

Hello Monday Community,

I am trying to use connected boards and mirror columns to make a multilevel board workflow.

When date arrives on commercial compliance master board, it will create an item in the fire panel/monitoring board. I’d like a connection established back to the master board to reflect the scheduled date from the fire panel/monitoring board. I tried a few connected columns automations but none seemed to auto link the items between boards.

IF anyone can steer me in the right direction that would be great!

Thanks,
Jared

posts.author: anca.racu (Anca Racu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

posts.author: nkahl (Nancy Kahl)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you tried setting up a Mirrored column to connect them? I have found the mirrored column works well for this.

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Use this automation recipe:

When date arrives, create an item in Fire Panel/Monitoring board and connect Fire Panel/Monitoring board with connected column.

Then you can set up a mirror column on your Commercial Compliance Master Board column that will pull in your Scheduled Date column from your Fire Panel/Monitoring board.

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml: I appreciate everyone’s response! I have been very busy, and will try some of your solutions now! I’ll let you know what works out best. Thank you!

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml: This worked out great, i appreciate it!
